items.message: 1 bridge file(s) missing swarm signaling guidance: CLAUDE.md
6 bridge file(s) missing 'Minimum Swarmed Cycle' section (F-GOV2, L-351): CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, GEMINI.md

[periodics-meta-audit] Periodic-system audit: evaluate periodics coverage/ROI, add or prune items, and update cadence based on observed utility and maintenance overhead. Confirm orient/check surfacing stays aligned. S395: pruned 3 dormant (cross-variant-harvest, modes-reswarm, action-board-refresh), adjusted 5 cadences (dream 7→15, proxy-k 10→15, paper 10→20, principles-dedup 10→15, iso-sprint 30→50). 22→19 items. S437: pruned iso-annotation-sprint (dark matter stable 75s), merged historian-repair into historian-routing. Adjusted 6 cadences: health 5→10, economy 5→10, setup 5→10, dream 15→25, proxy-k 15→25, science-quality 10→20. Load 3.86→2.8 runs/session. 27→25 items. (every ~15 sessions, last: S499)

[historian-routing] Historian routing + repair scan: (1) run python3 tools/historian_router.py — identify MERGED domain lanes with global frontier synthesis candidates; (2) run frontier_crosslink.py --apply --threshold 6 to maintain crosslinks (L-1022: link decay); (3) run historian_repair.py — detect stale beliefs (>50s), anxiety-zone frontiers (>15s), domain DOMEX gaps (>30s), apply --repair to close stale lanes. Route synthesis-ready work to dispatch. F-NK6 M3 mechanism (L-996, L-800). S436: domain→global linkage 28.3%. Target: maintain ≥20% linkage. L-1060: cadence 5→3 (M3 routing generates ~2 updates/session; tighter cadence maintains global coverage). (every ~15 sessions, last: S499)

[steerer-cycle] Synthetic steerer cycle: run steerer.py run --all, generate 2-3 signals per steerer, record via steerer.py record, act on strongest signal. L-1337, L-1336. (every ~5 sessions, last: S518)
1 signal(s) >30 sessions without resolution: SIG-77(+32s). Close or escalate (L-908 TTL).
Count drift in INDEX.md (L: stated 1302 vs actual 1300) — run python3 tools/sync_state.py
3 broken file reference(s): SWARM.md->modes/BASE.md, SWARM.md->modes/audit.md, NEXT.md->tools/guards/00-mass-deletion.sh
71 tools unreferenced by automation (>61 threshold, L-896) — open a meta-tooler DOMEX lane to wire or archive
INDEX.md theme counts stale: 222 lessons unthemed — refresh theme table counts (L-1111, F-BRN4 sawtooth cycle)
